kdebt__farm_business_debt_repayment_capa.name: Number of farms with debt
kdebt__farm_business_debt_repayment_capa.description: Number of farms that reported notes payable on December 31.

igcfi__farm_business_debt_repayment_capa.name: Gross cash farm income
igcfi__farm_business_debt_repayment_capa.description: For farms participating in government programs, gross cash farm income is the total amount of cash received by the farm operation from the sale of agricultural products, services rendered, or government payments received during a given calendar year.

drinc__farm_business_debt_repayment_capa.name: Income for debt coverage
drinc__farm_business_debt_repayment_capa.description: Calculated as net farm income plus interest on capital debt. Indicates the funds available for debt repayment.

drintp__farm_business_debt_repayment_cap.name: Principal/interest payments
drintp__farm_business_debt_repayment_cap.description: Reported farm business interest payments and estimated principal payments.

drdcm__farm_business_debt_repayment_capa.name: Debt coverage margin
drdcm__farm_business_debt_repayment_capa.description: Calculated as income for debt coverage minus the amount of funds necessary for debt payment of current obligations.

drmaxpay__farm_business_debt_repayment_c.name: Maximum loan payment
drmaxpay__farm_business_debt_repayment_c.description: Calculated as income for debt coverage divided by the minimum debt coverage ratio.

drmaxd75__farm_business_debt_repayment_c.name: Max feasible debt (7.5%)
drmaxd75__farm_business_debt_repayment_c.description: The maximum amount of debt that can be repaid given current income. Calculated at 7.5 percent interest rate amortized over a hypothetical repayment term of 7 years.

drmaxd10__farm_business_debt_repayment_c.name: Max feasible debt (10%)
drmaxd10__farm_business_debt_repayment_c.description: The maximum amount of debt that can be repaid given current income. Calculated at 10 percent interest rate amortized over a hypothetical repayment term of 7 years.

drcnum75__farm_business_debt_repayment_c.name: Repayment capacity use (7.5%)
drcnum75__farm_business_debt_repayment_c.description: The ratio of actual debt to maximum debt repayment capacity measures the extent of use of potential credit repayment ability.  Calculated assuming 7.5 percent interest rate.

drcnum10__farm_business_debt_repayment_c.name: Repayment capacity use (10%)
drcnum10__farm_business_debt_repayment_c.description: The ratio of actual debt to maximum debt repayment capacity measures the extent of use of potential credit repayment ability.  Calculated assuming 10 percent interest rate.

dtot__farm_business_debt_repayment_capac.name: Farm liabilities
dtot__farm_business_debt_repayment_capac.description: Total liabilities are composed of any monetary obligations of the farm operation on December 31. The amount reported includes principal due and any unpaid interest.  Debts for nonfarm purposes, even if farm or ranch assets are used as collateral, are excluded.

infi__farm_business_debt_repayment_capac.name: Net farm income
infi__farm_business_debt_repayment_capac.description: Net farm income indicates the profit or loss associated with current production. It represents the return (both monetary and nonmonetary) to farm operators for their labor, management and capital, after all production expenses have been paid (that is, gross farm income minus production expenses). It includes net income from farm production as well as net income attributed to the rental value of farm dwellings, the value of commodities consumed on the farm, depreciation, and inventory changes.
